goal: Build a 2D space shooter game in pygame with a player ship, enemy waves, bullets, collision detection, score tracking, and a game over screen

7e129ca4.name: Sprint Goal
7e129ca4.description: Build a 2D space shooter game in pygame with a player ship, enemy waves, bullets, collision detection, score tracking, and a game over screen

d3292c8d.name: Game Engine Core
d3292c8d.description: Initialize pygame, main event loop, display handling, and game state management.

44ba58ec.name: Entity Logic
44ba58ec.description: Implement player ship movement, bullet mechanics, and enemy wave spawning logic.

1b813172.name: Physics and Collision
1b813172.description: Handle coordinate math, hitbox detection, and resolution of projectile-enemy interactions.

9d78fe3f.name: UI and Scoring
9d78fe3f.description: Manage text rendering for score tracking and the game-over screen overlay.
